questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Hg Capital (and related entities including Prophix, insightsoftware and LucaNet) and OneStream are close competitors in Australia and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Hg Capital (including its related entities) and/or OneStream.
